description:
Both error mappers use the pattern

    se.map(|s| s.is_xxx()).unwrap_or(false)
    se.and_then(|s| s.meta().code()).map(|c| c == "...").unwrap_or(false)

at 7 sites in src/lib.rs (lines 62, 66, 77, 84, 105, 118, 125, 136). `Option::is_some_and` (stable since Rust 1.70; workspace MSRV is 1.75) reads more cleanly:

    se.is_some_and(|s| s.is_xxx())
    se.and_then(|s| s.meta().code()).is_some_and(|c| c == "...")

clippy::pedantic confirms with the `map_unwrap_or` lint at every site.

When restructuring, also collapse the redundant closure on the bare `is_xxx()` calls (lines 62, 67, 77, 105, 118):

    se.is_some_and(PutParameterError::is_invalid_key_id)

clippy::pedantic also flags this with `redundant_closure_for_method_calls`. Bundle the rewrite in one PR.
title: secretx-aws-ssm: replace .map(...).unwrap_or(false) with .is_some_and(...) (×7 sites)
